message: Personal decorations: members author a declarative backdrop 'mod' (decorations table + memberships.selected_decoration_id) layered over the campaign theme per-request via campaignRenderProps; chose a sandboxed image+knobs spec over raw user CSS for safety (safeCssUrl guard).

Decorations: reshape spec to {overrides: Partial<Decorations>, backdrop} so a mod overrides any named dimension (merged into the theme) plus a custom backdrop; add decorations.scope + campaigns.world_decoration_id for DM shared library + campaign default; render precedence personal->world->theme.
